title: Glicophyllum paludosum

This classification is based on its morphological characteristics and molecular analysis. It belongs to the phylum Ascomycota and the kingdom Fungi. Glicophyllum paludosum is further classified into the genus Glicophyllum, which is a relatively small group of lichens. The classification of Glicophyllum paludosum is subject to ongoing research and may be refined as new information becomes available.
